title: URGENT: Senior Project Manager x2 (civil/architectural)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Manage the planning, coordination, and execution of civil and architectural projects from start to finish

  • Liaise with clients, stakeholders, and cross-functional teams to ensure project objectives are met

  • Oversee the budget, timeline, and resource allocation for assigned projects

  • Identify and mitigate risks, and implement effective problem-solving strategies

  • Ensure projects comply with relevant industry regulations, safety standards, and quality requirements

  • Provide mentorship and guidance to junior project team members

  • Contribute to the continuous improvement of project management processes and best practices


What we're looking for

  • Degree in Civil Engineering, Architecture, or a related field

  • Registration as a Professional Engineer (P.E.) or Chartered Architect is highly desirable

  • 7+ years of experience in civil/structural engineering or project management in the construction industry

  • Proven track record of successfully leading and delivering complex civil, architectural or residential projects

  • Excellent project management skills, including the ability to plan, coordinate, and control project activities

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
